reason: Question 'Зображена табличка вказує:' directly references a depicted plate; the two options (час дії vs час обмеження дії) distinguish specific time-plates (e.g. 7.4.1 vs 7.4.7) that can only be told apart by seeing the picture. Candidate 33_117_0.jpeg is a generic warning-triangle + four numbered pictograms, NOT a time-of-operation plate, so it is wrong. Unanswerable from text alone.
